seoTitle: Mount Mee vs Mount Mellum — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Mee and Mount Mellum. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Mee vs Mount Mellum: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Mee and Mount Mellum.
heading: Mount Mee vs Mount Mellum — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Mee, Queensland and Mount Mellum, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Mee has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Mount Mellum (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Mee or Mount Mellum safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Mee has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Mount Mellum scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Mee scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Mellum scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Mee or Mount Mellum?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Mee has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
